caption:
💃 The rain tasted like ozone and neon.

I adjusted the collar of my crimson nano-silk bodysuit, feeling the synthetic fabric cling to my curves as I slipped through the crowd of the Obsidian Spire. Most people wore bulkier armor, bulky tech-sleeves to hide their frames, but I? I let the tech hug me. The fabric was cool against my skin, hiding the heat of the processors beneath the illusion of elegance.

Tonight’s mission wasn’t about saving the world; it was about stealing a heartbeat.

The target was the CEO of Kryo Dynamics. He knew I was a ghost, a phantom hacker, but he didn’t know I was beautiful enough to distract him.

I moved through the crowd, hips swaying just enough to draw eyes without saying a word. The bass from the sub-audio implants thumped in my chest, syncing with my own. My cybernetic implants hummed, scanning the crowd, marking the target.

He was on stage, speaking about "Humanity’s Evolution." I needed the data drive embedded in his suit.

I slid behind the velvet curtain, the fabric whispering against my thighs. The air was thick with perfume and static. I adjusted my top, ensuring the strategic layer of sheer mesh sat perfectly over my chest, creating shadows that danced in the low light.

His hand was on the mic, and his suit was a mess of ports and wires.

I reached out, fingers glowing blue with a decryption pulse. The data slid into my mind. As I turned to leave, the mic fell.

The room went silent.

He looked up, eyes locked onto mine. "Who are you?"

I smiled, the neon light catching the curve of my cheekbone.

"Just a girl with a lot of data and a little more fire."

Then I vanished into the shadows.

#Cyberpunk #NeonNights #TechWarrior #CyberFashion #FutureLove #DigitalGhost
